event: Portrait of a Nun and Child from the Sisters of the Holy Family
symbols: crucifix on the habit — consecrated life dedicated to Christ
rosary beads — devotion to prayer and the mysteries of the faith
nun’s habit and wimple — religious consecration and separation from the world
protective hand on the child — the Church’s mission of care for the vulnerable
description: A sepia-toned portrait photograph of a woman in a full religious habit with a white wimple and dark veil. A crucifix hangs at her chest, and a long rosary extends from her waist. She places one hand protectively on the shoulder of a young girl in a light patterned dress who stands beside her. Both subjects gaze directly at the camera with composed, dignified expressions. The background is a plain mottled surface.

_meta.title: Member of the Order of Sisters of the Holy Family and Child
